svg.text: Here's an updated script to do just that. You will need to right click the Touch Ground custom block and edit it to add a new boolean input named 'up?'. We then pass in the comparison of speed y > 0 which will be 'true' if the player is jumping (moving up). Note how we don't set falling to 0 when we hit our head as that would indicate our feet were on the ground! (allowing us to jump)
